cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/textkit2/__init__.py b/textkit2/__init__.py
index 3e3bc52..e8e04c6 100644
--- a/textkit2/__init__.py
+++ b/textkit2/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,8 @@
 
 def normalize_ws(s):
     return " ".join(s.split())
+
+def truncate(s, n):
+    if len(s) <= n:
+        return s
+    return s[: n - 1] + "…"

cases.name: off_by_one
cases.diff:
diff --git a/textkit2/__init__.py b/textkit2/__init__.py
index 3e3bc52..f6af27d 100644
--- a/textkit2/__init__.py
+++ b/textkit2/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,8 @@
 
 def normalize_ws(s):
     return " ".join(s.split())
+
+def truncate(s, n):
+    if len(s) <= n:
+        return s
+    return s[:n] + "…"

cases.name: always_truncates
cases.diff:
diff --git a/textkit2/__init__.py b/textkit2/__init__.py
index 3e3bc52..2039623 100644
--- a/textkit2/__init__.py
+++ b/textkit2/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,6 @@
 
 def normalize_ws(s):
     return " ".join(s.split())
+
+def truncate(s, n):
+    return s[: n - 1] + "…"
